nasb.text: In the thirty-eighth year of Azariah king of Judah, Zechariah the son of Jeroboam became king over Israel in Samaria for six months.

esv.text: In the thirty-eighth year of Azariah king of Judah, Zechariah the son of Jeroboam reigned over Israel in Samaria six months.

cnv.text: 猶大王亞撒利雅在位第三十八年，耶羅波安的兒子撒迦利雅在撒瑪利亞登基，統治以色列共六個月。

ccb.text: 犹大王亚撒利雅执政第三十八年，耶罗波安的儿子撒迦利雅在撒玛利亚登基做以色列王，执政六个月。
